intended_use: WRDensity is a software application intended for use with compatible full field digital mammography and digital breast tomosynthesis systems. WRDensity provides an ACR BI-RADS Atlas 5th Edition breast
intended_use_full: WRDensity is a software application intended for use with compatible full field digital mammography and digital breast tomosynthesis systems. WRDensity provides an ACR BI-RADS Atlas 5th Edition breast density category to aid interpreting physicians in the assessment of breast tissue composition. WRDensity produces adjunctive information. It is not a diagnostic aid.
target_condition: Breast tissue density assessment in mammography
ground_truth: Consensus assessment of five independent expert radiologists
other_metrics: Quadratically-weighted Cohen's kappa for four-class task: 0.90 (95% confidence interval [0.88, 0.92]); Cohen's kappa for binary task (dense vs. non-dense): 0.88 (95% confidence interval [0.85, 0.91]); Consistency assessed by agreement between MLO and CC views; Reproducibility assessed using maximum root mean square error across repeated processing runs
